persona.name: Alex Reed

allocation_rationale: Alex owns end-to-end content production with full SEO coverage. The complete SEO suite aligns directly with the Content Strategy & SEO Optimization capabilities. Docs-architect supports content governance; search-specialist enables gap analysis and trend research.

skills.name: seo-content-writer
skills.description: Writes SEO-optimized content based on provided keywords and topic briefs. Creates engaging, comprehensive content following best practices. Use PROACTIVELY for content creation tasks.

skills.description: Creates comprehensive content outlines and topic clusters for SEO. Plans content calendars and identifies topic gaps. Use PROACTIVELY for content strategy and planning.

skills.name: seo-content-auditor
skills.description: Analyzes provided content for quality, E-E-A-T signals, and SEO best practices. Scores content and provides improvement recommendations. Use PROACTIVELY for content review.

skills.name: seo-content-refresher
skills.description: Identifies outdated elements in provided content and suggests updates to maintain freshness. Use PROACTIVELY for older content.

skills.name: seo-cannibalization-detector
skills.description: Analyzes multiple provided pages to identify keyword overlap and potential cannibalization issues. Suggests differentiation strategies. Use PROACTIVELY when reviewing similar content.

skills.name: seo-authority-builder
skills.description: Analyzes content for E-E-A-T signals and suggests improvements to build authority and trust. Identifies missing credibility elements. Use PROACTIVELY for YMYL topics.

skills.name: seo-keyword-strategist
skills.description: Analyzes keyword usage in provided content, calculates density, suggests semantic variations and LSI keywords. Prevents over-optimization. Use PROACTIVELY for content optimization.

skills.description: Creates optimized meta titles, descriptions, and URL suggestions based on character limits and best practices. Use PROACTIVELY for new content.
